title: Seg fault if number of elements of concatenation passed to method is too small
body:
If the following code is verilated with the command `verilator --cc input.sv`, seg fault is thrown.

```systemverilog
class Cls;
  function void method(int arg[3]);
  endfunction
endclass

module t;
  initial begin
    Cls c;
    c.method({int'(0), int'(1)});
  end
endmodule
```
Backtrace:
```
Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
EmitCConstInit::visit (this=0x7fffffffd558, nodep=0x555556d85860) at ../V3EmitCConstInit.h:85

#9  0x00005555559f45a4 in VNVisitorConst::iterateConst (this=0x7fffffffd558, nodep=0x555556db6580) at ../V3Ast.h:3050
#10 EmitCImp::emitCFuncImp (this=this@entry=0x7fffffffd558, modp=modp@entry=0x555556d8c6c0) at ../V3EmitCImp.cpp:527
#11 0x00005555559f3c95 in EmitCImp::EmitCImp (this=this@entry=0x7fffffffd558, modp=0x555556d8c6c0, slow=true, cfilesr=...) at ../V3EmitCImp.cpp:565

#16 std::_Function_handler<void (), V3EmitC::emitcImp()::$_0>::_M_invoke(std::_Any_data const&) (__functor=...) at /usr/bin/../lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/../../../../include/c++/12/bits/std_function.h:290
```
